full_text:
Zhu Ran (Yifeng) 朱然 (義封)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Ran (朱然), styledYifeng (義封). Served Wu. Was the son of Zhu Zhi’s sister. Studied together with Sun Quan. Zhu Ran was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhu Ran lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
